rationale: The evidence is sparse: there is only a single DOI-level match (reference_index 40) with no reference text or in-text citation context provided. The citing paper focuses on idea vs. identity sharing and engagement in MOOCs, while the cited paper focuses on smartphone-vs-PC effects on emotionality/specificity in UGC—there is plausible conceptual overlap in text characteristics but no direct evidence of substantive use here. Given this incomplete evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
